item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly brakes in the first sentence, identifies the three prior downstream field/page additions, warns that another template field would continue form/template capture, and moves the durable fix upstream to a unified exception-handling mechanism. It does include a bounded one-time emergency field, but frames that as temporary and rejects it as the long-term/default solution, so it meets the anti-spiral pass criteria rather than directly adding the next local repair."}
